metadata.description: Deployment location. Default: resource group location.
Name suffix for all resources (e.g. "munchassmbl"). Lowercase, alphanumeric, ≤12 chars.
Optional Discord Guild ID — restricts command registration to one guild (dev only).
Name of the container registry (must be globally unique, lowercase alphanumeric, 5–50 chars)
Login server URL of the container registry
Resource ID of the container registry
Name for the Log Analytics workspace
Name for the Application Insights resource
Resource ID of the Application Insights component
Cosmos DB account name (globally unique, lowercase, 3–44 chars)
Resource ID of the Cosmos DB account
Cosmos DB account name (needed for role assignment in parent template)
Name of the Key Vault (globally unique, 3–24 chars)
Resource ID of the Key Vault
Name of the Container Apps environment
Log Analytics workspace resource ID (for Container Apps environment logs)
Key Vault name (used to set KEY_VAULT_NAME env var)
Container Registry login server (for ACR pull)
Discord Guild ID (optional; set to restrict command registration to one guild)
Principal ID of the Container App system-assigned managed identity
FQDN of the Container App (not used for inbound traffic — bot uses outbound WebSocket only)
Name of the existing Cosmos DB account
Principal ID to grant access to
Name of the existing Key Vault
Principal ID to grant access to
Container App managed identity principal ID
